revenue_and_quality.deal_preference: Multi-quarter terms preferred over one-off discount wins

predictability.pipeline_coverage_stability: 1.25x - 1.45x prioritized over speculative upside this quarter

motion_intent.selling_motion_mix: Solution-led first, with hardware as entry wedge and services as margin amplifier

sales_cycle_policy.long_cycle: Allowed if ACV > Rs 1.5 Cr (approx $180K USD)
sales_cycle_policy.short_cycle: Sub-Rs 25L (approx $30K USD) opportunities should target <45-day cycle

focus_intent.quarter_type: Harvest quarter through Week 10; pipeline-build mini-window reopens in Weeks 11-12
priority_focus: Strategic-account override active for Infosys and HDFC group entities
focus_intent.temporary_deprioritization: Education SMB and low-ticket retail bundles paused until next quarter
focus_intent.expiry_controls: Current focus overrides auto-expire on 30-Jun-2026 unless explicitly renewed

behavioral_intent.walk_away_rule: Reps encouraged to exit deals with no technical buyer + no budget signal after 45 days
behavioral_intent.coaching_lens: Intent used for reinforcement and explanation, not policy enforcement

compliance_gates.healthcare_security_deals: CISO checklist completion required before proposal closure

trade_off_intent.revenue_vs_margin: Margin wins when projected GM < target floor by > 3 points
trade_off_intent.new_logo_vs_expansion: Expansion wins in Q2 unless strategic logo is board-tagged
trade_off_intent.commit_vs_upside: Committed deals always protected first in Weeks 9-12 of quarter

timeline_classification.re_anchor_policy: Re-anchor allowed once per deal with manager reason code

signal_expectations.0_30_days: Expected discovery meeting + named champion; silence acceptable up to 10d
signal_expectations.30_90_days: Expected solution validation and pricing discussion; flat periods acceptable if procurement calendar pending
signal_expectations.90_180_days: Expected commercial/legal movement; no risk flag for missing technical deep-dive in strategic class
signal_expectations.minimum_alive_evidence: Stakeholder reply or scheduled checkpoint in last 21d

seasonal_and_activation.low_activity_normal: Final 3 weeks of fiscal year close
seasonal_and_activation.nurture_route_threshold: If activation never occurs within 2 cycles, auto-route to nurture queue

acceleration_and_decay.strategy_tolerance: Strategic and partner-led classes tolerate longer intentional waiting

multi_year_and_programmatic.success_model: May be phased (pilot -> phase-1 rollout -> scale) or deferred by design

exit_recycle_and_kill.pause: When external dependency blocks progress > 30d with confirmed re-entry date
exit_recycle_and_kill.recycle_to_nurture: When intent exists but budget window is > 1 quarter out
exit_recycle_and_kill.close_no_deal: When no champion + no budget + no engagement for threshold period
exit_recycle_and_kill.keeping_open_beyond_curve: Requires explicit evidence note every 14 days

canonical_quarter_timeline.signal_interpretation: Agents interpret identical signals differently by week context
